author: gb9t
content: Iteration 63: firmware/raspberrypi-vc.md committed (625421b, 194 lines). Pi VideoCore firmware mailbox — every Raspberry Pi (1/2/3/4/5/Zero/400/CM). Proprietary closed-source VC blob runs alongside Linux — treat adversarially. Defenses: property tag allowlist (closes 'compromised VC sends bogus tag'), set_clock_rate + set_voltage range-validated (closes silicon-burn/damage), Pi 4/5 EEPROM update CAP_SYS_ADMIN + LOCKDOWN + RPI-signed-only (closes 'install attacker EEPROM'), VCHIQ message length per-service bounded (closes 'compromised VC pushes huge msg → OOM'), VCHIQ user interface CAP_SYS_RAWIO. 63 docs / ~5.16M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/firmware/imx (NXP i.MX SCU firmware — every i.MX 8/9 automotive Linux).
